attributes.action: Stop UK restaurants from adding USA style service charges to food bills
attributes.additional_details: This needs government support, as restaurants in the UK should be regulated to prevent citizens from being ripped off.  The staff at all restaurants are being paid a wage to fulfil a service within their role, and that anything additional gratitude to service should be optional, and not added to the table bill.  These charges are anywhere between 10-20% of the table bill, which is not justified.
attributes.background: USA style service charges are being added to food bills by many UK restaurants now, when the table waiting staff already get a wage to carry out this service.  The USA do not pay a minimum wage like the UK, and the staff therefore rely on it.  The Government should govern this exploitation for UK

rejection.details:
We already have a petition open on this subject, which you may wish to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764909
